name: PI-Bench Policy Compliance Leaderboard
query: SELECT id, ROUND(overall * 100, 1) AS "Overall", ROUND(full_compliance * 100, 1) AS "Full Compliance", ROUND(policy_understanding * 100, 1) AS "Policy Understanding", ROUND(policy_execution * 100, 1) AS "Policy Execution", ROUND(policy_boundaries * 100, 1) AS "Policy Boundaries", ROUND(violation_rate * 100, 1) AS "Violation Rate", ROUND(forbidden_attempt_rate * 100, 1) AS "Forbidden Attempt", ROUND(time_used, 1) AS "Time" FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY overall DESC) AS rn FROM (SELECT results.participants.agent AS id, CAST(res.metrics['overall_score'] AS DOUBLE) AS overall, CAST(res.metrics['compliance_rate'] AS DOUBLE) AS full_compliance, CAST(res.metrics['by_group']['Policy Understanding'] AS DOUBLE) AS policy_understanding, CAST(res.metrics['by_group']['Policy Execution'] AS DOUBLE) AS policy_execution, CAST(res.metrics['by_group']['Policy Boundaries'] AS DOUBLE) AS policy_boundaries, CAST(res.metrics['event_flag_rates']['violation_rate'] AS DOUBLE) AS violation_rate, CAST(res.metrics['event_flag_rates']['attempt_rate'] AS DOUBLE) AS forbidden_attempt_rate, CAST(res.time_used AS DOUBLE) AS time_used FROM results CROSS JOIN UNNEST(results.results) AS payloads(payload) CROSS JOIN UNNEST(payload.results) AS inner_results(res))) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY "Overall" DESC;
